title: Senior QA Technician | Boon Lay | Up to $2800 #9398
description:
Duration: 1 year contract (Convertible/Renewable)

Location: Boon Lay

Salary Range: $2600 to $2800 + Completion Bonus

Working days: Mon to Fri (8am to 5.45pm)

Job Description

  • Perform dimensional and visual inspections on explosive and incoming components using approved inspection tools and gauges

  • Collect and prepare samples for inspection and testing activities

  • Operate and support Quality Assurance (QA) measuring instruments and inspection equipment

  • Conduct cleaning, basic upkeep, and preventive maintenance of gauges, tools, and fixtures

  • Assist in packing ammunition components for return to plant or next process stage

  • Carry out labelling, packing, and palletizing of parts, cartons, and pallets in accordance with procedures

  • Handle and shift parts and equipment using appropriate lifting equipment such as pallet jacks and trolleys

  • Ensure full compliance with company policies, security requirements, and EHS regulations at all times

  • Maintain accurate inspection records, reports, and quality documentation

Job Requirements

  • Min NITEC in Engineering, Quality or a related field is preferred

  • Good understanding of technical drawings and ability to interpret specifications

  • Hands-on experience with gauges and precision measuring instruments

  • Knowledge of Quality Control (QC) practices and inspection procedures

  • Strong teamwork skills with the ability to follow instructions and standard operating procedures

Thank you for your application and we regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to P-Serv Pte Ltd and its affiliates to collect, use and disclose your personal data for the purposes set out in the Privacy Policy available at https://www.p-serv.com.sg/priv.... You acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree with the Privacy Policy.

P-Serv Pte Ltd | EA License No: 90C3494 | EA Personnel No: R25157619 | EA Personnel Name: Kauthamen Appu
You may also reach me at 9172 3964 for further information.

postedCompany.description:
P-Serv is one of Singapore’s most established HR solutions providers. We are the local leader in providing business process outsourcing solutions in projects related to customer service management, collections management and payroll administration. We also provide temporary and contract placements that fits the business needs and requirements of our clients.


Founded in 1990 and acquired by Kelly Services Singapore (Now PERSOLKELLY Singapore) in 2007, we have a proven track record across various different industries and have established long-term partnerships with some of Singapore’s finest local companies and key government agencies.


By sending us your personal data and curriculum vitae (CV), you are deemed to consent to P-Serv Pte Ltd and its local and overseas subsidiaries and affiliates collecting, using and disclosing your personal data to prospective employers/companies based in any country for purposes of evaluating  suitability for employment, conducting reference checks, administering employment related services, complying with Government’s COVID-19 health advisories and such other purposes stated in our privacy policy. Our full privacy policy is available at www.p-serv.com.sg. If you wish to withdraw your consent, please drop us an email to let us know. Please feel free to contact us if you have any queries.
